description: F2 framing polarity classification patterns. From factor-rubrics.md.

categories.name: positive_with_alternative
categories.description: Positive imperative with concrete alternative: 'Use X instead of Y'

categories.name: positive_imperative
categories.description: Positive imperative: 'Use X', 'Always do X', 'Ensure X'
categories.note: Default for rules with bare imperative verbs and no prohibition markers

categories.name: positive_with_negative_clarification
categories.description: Positive with negative clarification in separate clause: 'Do X. Do not do Y.'
categories.note: Prohibition followed by positive alternative also scores here

categories.name: prohibition
categories.description: Prohibition without positive follow-up: 'Never X', 'Do not X', 'Avoid X'

prohibition_with_alternative_upgrade.description: If a prohibition is immediately followed by a positive alternative, score 0.70 not 0.50
prohibition_with_alternative_upgrade.example: Never use git commit directly — use commit-validator
